think with you, not for you.

Master prompts for every teacher and student. Many ask you a few questions first, then deliver a premium, exam-accurate answer. Attach a photo of any question and they solve it — step by step. Every answer comes signed, so students can find their teacher.

Start here · 60 seconds

Two modes. Pick yours.

👩‍🏫 Teacher — make solutions, mock papers, lessons, doubt-clinics. 🎓 Student — get a tutor, solve doubts from a photo, plan your prep.

Four small steps.

  1. Open a free AI tool — pick one on the right.
  2. Choose Teacher or Student, then your track & subject below.
  3. Copy a prompt, paste it, and answer its questions (or attach your question's photo).
  4. Get a premium answer — signed so students can reach their teacher.
Open a free AI tool
ChatGPT Claude Gemini
What "asks-first" feels like
You: *copy a tutor prompt* AI: "Before I solve — what's your class & target exam, and where exactly are you stuck? (1/4)" You: answer · AI guides you to the answer.
